A couple of ways to to use AB/CD legs    Day traders - knowing where were at with in the AB/CD pattern, generally keep you on right side of trend intra day.     Short Term Traders - playing the AB/CD legs in both directions. multiple ways to stack and layer.     LT investors - typically not a bad spot to add to existing positions when a CD leg completes on your time frame. It is a way to keep cost basis down and add/buy on weakness. Especially if an area of confluence. When a pattern’s move completes, it generally needs time to pause and likely get a reversal, even if ends up being a dead cat.     $AAPL

Despite the sequential rebound, sales were still down -9% y/y, primarily due to the more aggressive promotional activity for the iPhone 16 series in the same period last year    CounterPoint: The 618 shopping festival, combined with the first wave of post-college-exam upgrades, drove a month-on-month recovery in June. However, the market is expected to enter a seasonal slowdown afterward. Frequent signals from smartphone vendors and supply chain partners have made it clear to consumers that price hikes are likely to persist in the second half of the year. In such a situation, users with genuine upgrade demands tend to bring forward their purchases to the 618 period. At the same time, smartphone OEMs have adopted a profit-first and conservative strategy, further scaling back shipment plans for the year. We expect the overall Chinese smartphone market to post a double-digit decline in shipments for the full year.    $FXI $QCOM

$AAPL No news. It's dealer mechanics. Institutions loaded $15M+ in AAPL calls over the past two days at the $320 strike. Market makers who sold those calls have to buy shares to hedge. Add in VIX fading all week (forces even more dealer buying through vanna hedging) and $225M in charm exposure pulling price toward $320 by Friday expiration. There's also $32M in dark pool accumulation after Wednesday's close. This isn't news driven. It's the options market machine doing exactly what the positioning said it would do. $310 floor, $320 magnet. Watch.
